* Piecewise linear input for diode clipper
* Large amplitude sine wave to demonstrate clipping
* 500 Hz, 5V amplitude

0.0000 0.0000
0.0005 1.5451
0.0010 2.9390
0.0015 4.0451
0.0020 4.7553
0.0025 5.0000
0.0030 4.7553
0.0035 4.0451
0.0040 2.9390
0.0045 1.5451
0.0050 0.0000

0.0060 -2.9390

0.0090 -2.9390
0.0095 -1.5451
